_comment: Per-scenario baseline observations captured on main HEAD before any uplift
code change lands. User edits this file after running each fixture through
the 04-Design agent in Copilot Chat. Run `node tools/scripts/capture-drawio-baseline.mjs`
after every entry to regenerate regen-baseline.json.

g1-three-tier-web.observations: Strict retries=0 (1 add-cells batch, 0 clear-diagram, 0 corrective edits). Friction events captured: (1) MCP infra setup [1 failed search-shapes + 6 debug terminal calls before retry succeeded]; (2) redundant finish-diagram preview before compressed export; (3) post-export palette correction via sed (#EFF6FF/#0078D4 -> #E7F5FF/#6C8EBF) instead of MCP edit-cells. Visual quality observed below 3/4 acceptance bar (rubric mean ~2.86).
quality_issues: Edge-label collision: 'SqlHTTPS' visible — two parallel edges (HTTPS to Storage and SQL/TDS to Azure SQL DB) had labels overlap into a fused string. Pain point #5.
Missing Managed Identity edges per prompt: prompt requires Web App -> Key Vault and Web App -> SQL via Managed Identity; only one Web App -> SQL edge rendered. Pain point #5.

Application Insights and Log Analytics Workspace placed below the resource group with no zone label and no telemetry edges from Web App. No 'Observability' or cross-cutting zone visible. Pain point #4.
No trust-boundary marker at the End User -> Web App public ingress. Pain point #4.
Web App -> Storage and Web App -> SQL edges visually overlap before fan-out, contributing to label collision. Pain point #2.
